description: JWT-based authentication, token rotation, and role-based session management.
decisions: Short-lived JWT access tokens (15m) combined with database-backed refresh tokens in HTTP-only cookies for maximum security.

history.action: Initialized Auth module with basic JWT.
history.author: Backend Team

history.action: Added refresh token rotation and token revocation on logout.
history.author: Backend Team

description: Employee CRUD, profile management, capability mapping, document uploads, and soft deletion.
knownIssues: Large payloads when fetching employee profiles with manager details - optimization required to select fields.
decisions: Enforce soft-delete using deletedAt and isActive rather than physical database record deletion to maintain historical relations.

history.action: Created core Employee tables and endpoints.
history.author: Backend Team

history.action: Added profile picture uploading and file attachment management.
history.author: Fullstack Team

description: Organizational department definition, code allocation, and department head mapping.
decisions: Each department must have a unique alphanumeric code for reporting purposes.

history.action: Scaffolded department CRUD endpoints and UI tables.
history.author: Fullstack Team

description: Check-in, check-out, break sessions, work hours computation, late tracking, and regularization.
decisions: Limit daily attendance records to exactly one per employee. Compute work and break duration server-side to prevent tampering.

history.action: Implemented check-in/check-out endpoints and backend validations.
history.author: Backend Team

history.action: Added break tracking and manager regularization flow.
history.author: Fullstack Team

description: Leave policy enforcement, carry forwards, balance queries, manager/HR workflows, and medical proofs.
decisions: Deduct balances only upon final approval. Restrict employees from approving their own leaves, even if they are managers.

history.action: Implemented leave request creation and balance check logic.
history.author: Backend Team

history.action: Built two-tier approval workflow (Manager -> HR) and balance debiting.
history.author: Fullstack Team

description: Salary generation, payslips, overtime sessions, incentives, and publishing workflows.
knownIssues: Monthly payroll generation lock mechanism is in draft phase. Currently generated on-demand.
decisions: Salary templates are kept simple in V1. Payroll record is immutable once published to employees.

history.action: Scaffolded payroll records and draft generation.
history.author: Finance Team

history.action: Implemented incentives and overtime verification endpoints.
history.author: Finance Team

description: Role-specific summaries, widgets, analytics charts, and active updates.
knownIssues: Redundant global summaries hit on page load by Navbar and Dashboard, causing double-fetching.
decisions: Keep dashboard queries synchronous and live-query based initially; implement client caching or context lifting for shared metrics.

history.action: Built employee and manager dashboards with interactive widgets.
history.author: Frontend Team

description: Google OAuth syncing, automated Out of Office calendar blocks, Quick Meet links, and Microsoft Teams chat notifications.
knownIssues: Need to store Refresh Tokens in the database to sync events on behalf of the user when they are offline.
decisions: Link user profiles to corporate Google accounts. Trigger automatic calendar creation on final LeaveRequest approval. Send direct notifications via Microsoft Teams webhooks.

history.action: Completed Google OAuth callback and link database schema.
history.author: Integrations Team

history.action: Implemented Google Calendar Out-Of-Office automatic block.
history.author: Integrations Team

history.action: Pivoted chat notifications from Google Chat to Microsoft Teams.
history.author: Integrations Team

description: Personal todos, checklists, manager-assigned tasks, completion tracking, and history logs.
decisions: Allow managers to assign tasks directly to individuals or assign general team tasks where multiple members can log completion.

history.action: Created personal checklist (Todo) endpoints.
history.author: Backend Team

history.action: Added Manager Task allocation and general checklist completion logic.
history.author: Fullstack Team

description: In-app notifications, web push subscriptions (PushSubscription), and background outbox dispatch.
decisions: Implement an outbox pattern for notification reliability, ensuring retries are handled for push service errors.

history.action: Implemented in-app notifications system.
history.author: Backend Team

history.action: Integrated VAPID keys and web push subscriptions.
history.author: Backend Team

description: Interactive HTML templates and multi-recipient email broadcaster.
decisions: Provide pre-scaffolded templates for Leave Approvals, Salary slips, and System Announcements with variable injection.

history.action: Completed Email template editing UI and backend nodemailer broadcaster integration.
history.author: Fullstack Team

description: Tracking sales records per employee, linking outlook email sales data, and manager target configuration.
decisions: Store monthly sales numbers and calculate incentives based on dynamic performance achievements.

history.action: Added SalesRecord tracking and linking targets.
history.author: Finance Team
